basics.name: Jono Fox
basics.label: Principal Product Designer
basics.summary: Principal Product Designer with 6+ years in product design and 9 years as an Art Director in advertising. Specialist in developer tools, design systems, developer experience (DevEx), and complex B2B/enterprise products. Currently at Aerospike, previously Workwise, Sygnum Bank, and Publicis. Available for senior IC and design leadership roles.

work.name: Aerospike
work.summary: Principal Product Designer at an enterprise NoSQL database company. Leading design of developer tools, cluster provisioning flows, and visual database exploration tools. Building and owning the design system including an AI instruction layer for Claude, Cursor, and Codex.
highlights: Designed cluster provisioning flow enabling teams to launch in under 90 seconds
Led end-to-end design of Aerospike Voyager, the company's first visual developer tool
Built and owns design system including AI-readable documentation layer
Established design system used across multiple product teams

work.name: Workwise
work.summary: Senior product design role at a recruiting platform. Stabilised and evolved a design system that had grown organically, improving consistency across teams.
highlights: Stabilised and evolved company-wide design system
Improved UI consistency across product teams

work.name: Sygnum Bank
work.summary: Design Lead at the world's first regulated digital asset bank. Designed the central digital assets dashboard. Led a junior designer. Built and validated a new design system under real product complexity.
highlights: Designed digital assets dashboard for high-net-worth private banking clients
Led junior designer as Team Lead
Built design system from scratch, adopted across all product teams
Translated complex blockchain and fintech concepts into understandable UI

work.name: Publicis
work.summary: Senior Conceptual Designer / Art Director at global advertising agency. Worked across Droga5, Clemenger BBDO, Grey, and others.
highlights: Webby Awards, D&AD, The One Show, New York Festivals recognition
Worked with clients including Heineken, Netflix, American Express, Gillette, UBS
